feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Sick of Love Songs
entry.summary:
Author: capricious_Bastard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,092Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: It's always there. Bubbling and boiling away. His blood warms with heat, his eyes sharpen and crackle. His hands rough with callouses. He hadn't noticed it at first. Just something that happened in the background, in moments he never realised he brushed off as nothing. But one moment, one pause, one second of realisation has him breaking the glass in his hands.

entry.title: Just do it!
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,733Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: 3 times Dick, Jason and Tim tried to helpd Clark confess to Bruce and 1 time he did it unplanned.-The silence was soon interrupted by Bruce, “Dick mentioned something about you earlier,” he said, crossing his legs.“Did he?” Clark asked, lifting his gaze towards Bruce. He hummed in reply, nodding. “He said someone was planning to confess tonight.” Clark's heart skipped a beat,Darn it, Dick!Bruce, completely unaware of the crisis unfolding in front of him, continued, “You should tell them,” he suggested, Clark looked at him evenly, “..What?” He asked.

entry.title: You Are My Destiny
entry.summary:
Author: Phenomamal

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,845Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 44

Summary: More tags will probably be added. Wrote this after watching “something very bad is going to happen” on Netflix cause everything leads to Superbat in my mind. Clark and Lois get married, Bruce struggles to find where he fits in that equation. Finds it even harder to accept the result. That to Clark, they were nothing more than friends. Clark struggles with his choice. Had he married the right person?

entry.title: Bats in the Attic
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,480Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Where he came from or what his motives were weren't immediately clear. He and the other Kryptonians attacked out of nowhere. At first, Bruce suspected some sort of mind control. But when Kal-El swatted Bruce's green kryptonite out of his hand like it was a child's toy, laughing and unaffected, he knew it was something deeper than that. But his contingencies failed, one after another. Bruce failed. Kal-El brought him, beaten half to death, here. Locked him in this lonely cell… and nursed him back to health. Almost tenderly. He's healed now, but no more able to escape then when he was to injured too move. He tells himself he's biding his time, waiting for an opportunity to escape. To fight back. For Kal-El to make a mistake that he can use. In the meantime, Kal-El comes to him every night.

entry.title: Longing for Carnations
entry.summary:
Author: NyxieSpades27

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,548Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: There were many rumors surrounding Bruce Wayne. Was the man some sort of undercover mob boss? Were his parents still alive and it was all just a plot for a bigger scheme of heritage play? What was hidden behind the mansion that no man dared search until the very core? No one would ever imagine what was actually below it all. The Facade. The Wealth. It hid a place he built himself. One designed to deal with corruption and insanity. One which held rooms after rooms with a different name each. Richard Grayson Jason Todd Cassandra Cain Timothy Drake Damian Wayne   Because below it all—covered by expensive marble flooring, billion dollars portraits, and the richest man in the whole of Gotham—was a Program built on hope. A Reformation Program. Or Legacy Characters of the Justice League are captured, threatened, or biologically owned by their respective villains. It is the job of the League to help this kids see that not everything is built on vengeance and wrath.

entry.title: The Three Body Problem of Soulmates
entry.summary:
Author: Justanotherfannerd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,655Chapters: 2/11Kudos: 13

Summary: Batman, no Bruce should be used to the end of the world by now. It’s certainly happened enough times to not be as terrifyingly concerning as the first time it happened, but this just seems to be a new way to tell the same story. He honestly wishes it was just his usual nonsense though.Clark thinks of himself as a pretty chill guy, not someone easily rattled. He only harms someone if his hand is forced and he certainly never thinks of killing anyone. . . but if he gets out of this without murdering Bruce? It’ll be nothing short of a miracle and he doesn’t believe in those much anymore.Or in other words!A non-traditional soulmate fic that drags Clark and Bruce through time and they're emotions! How fun!

entry.summary:
Author: Ferox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,537Chapters: 17/19Kudos: 1,111

Summary: For Superbat Week 2024: Day 6 Firefighter Clark & Dr. Bruce. Clark Kent has been Tower 344’s fire lookout for the last decade. When a camper is injured in the remote woods, he ends up with an unexpected house guest while they wait for the next available medical evacuation.

entry.title: Ain't That a Kick in the Head
entry.summary:
Author: QuackerofOats

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,548Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: “Dear Editor Kent, Your article on the corruption of Gothamite council members provides a sufficient timeline of evidence of embezzlement. I admire your dedication to honest journalism.  BW Bruce Wayne  CEO of Wayne Enterprises” Good Golly, his article was read by Bruce Wayne? THE prince of Gotham? He had to hold himself from flying through the ceiling in his excitement; he was too old for those shenanigans. If he stressed enough, more gray would start to appear in his temple strands. OR Editor Clark Kent gets a letter from unsociable Bruce Wayne on his latest article.

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,166Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,023Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 48

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

entry.title: Never too Late
entry.summary:
Author: wutian010701

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,812Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 13

Summary: When the surprise hits, Superman feels like he's been handed the greatest gift on Earth, and Batwoman starts having nightmares. A theory about if the Injustice:God Among Us begins with Superman loses Batwoman - as in the love of his life & his pregnant wife. *Though the official Earth-11 gender-swap canon uses the name Bryce, it just feels too distant for readers to connect with Bruce... so I'm using Brucia.*

entry.title: Reroll Guide: Kryptonian Build Unlock Via Aggressive Matchmaking
entry.summary:
Author: RevasLavellan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,301Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 59

Summary: She has died in Gotham enough times to write a book on “101 creative ways to die” and develop an opinion on game balance—whoever designed this hell-broken death-trap disguised as a city deserves jail. Preferably in Arkham. Preferably right between Joker and Riddler. So when she finally rolled a miracle jackpot account—Bruce Wayne’s daughter—she does the only sensible thing every true hard-core gamer would do: panic and drop an irresponsible amount of money on a premium trait for better survivability…only to be hit with the worst unlock prerequisite she has ever seen—namely getting the World’s Finest to fall in love on schedule. Now she has a rare build, a ticking origin-story deadline, and two stubborn not-yet-legendary future parents who are somehow both intelligent yet completely, impossibly useless at following obvious romantic instructions. …It really would be easier if Batman was being less Batman about it. Well, Claire will just have to show them how extreme a Player can get to preserve her hard-won Kryptonian build. If she has to take matters into her own hands and personally drag this timeline to the altar by its ankles, then so be it. Trust me, the universe will cooperate.

entry.title: Sip
entry.summary:
Author: unbreakabledawn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 805Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 62

Summary: Bruce likes to hover when Clark's injured. Sometimes Bruce needs a little care, too. — Bruce lets Clark unmask him, then pulls off the rest of his cowl himself. His eyes are shards of ice, the same shade of blue as a polar vortex. They carry nothing but warm fondness for Clark. “How long has it been since you fed?” Clark asks gently.
